description: A scheduled ticket taker has not shown up for their shift, and the gates are about to open.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification that a staff member has not checked in for their shift.
Identify which gate is now understaffed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines Gate C is short one ticket taker.

nodes.task_description: Identify a staff member in a less critical role (e.g., a 'greeter') who can be reassigned.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a greeter who is cross-trained as a ticket taker.

nodes.task_description: Reassign the greeter to cover the ticket taking position at Gate C.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the staff member's assignment in the scheduling system and notifies them of the change.
